workspace.name: DSA Theory Starter

workspace.conciseSummary: Starter workspace for practicing local import and quiz flows.
workspace.detailedSummary: This sample package mirrors the shape used by the app's workspace export manifest.

topics.title: Balanced BST search
topics.summary: Searching a balanced BST is logarithmic because each step discards half the remaining candidates.
topics.detailedSummary: A balanced BST preserves height near log n, so search cost tracks tree height.
commonMistakes: Claiming O(log n) for every BST regardless of shape.

questions.questionText: What is the time complexity of searching in a balanced BST and why?
questions.correctAnswer: O(log n), because the balanced height is logarithmic and each comparison moves one level down the tree.
gradingRubric: Connects the answer to tree height.
questions.explanation: This checks whether the student understands the relationship between balance and height.

documents.title: Imported sample text
documents.extractedText: Balanced BSTs maintain logarithmic height, which keeps search efficient.
